items.title: Orlando Magic Exercise Team Option on Jamal Cain
items.author: NBA.com
items.body_excerpt: Orlando Magic Exercise Team Option on Jamal Cain NBA.com

items.title: Breaking News: The #Magic have exercised Jamal Cain’s $2.58 million team option for the 2026-27 season, a league source told
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Breaking News: The #Magic have exercised Jamal Cain’s $2.58 million team option for the 2026-27 season, a league source told 
 @orlandosentinel.com.
